facts.fact: Soldiers alternated between waiting, marching, digging, sleeping, and short bursts of action.
facts.note: Daily routine is a pressure system, not downtime.

facts.fact: Rations were repetitive even when calories were adequate.
facts.note: Variety and morale matter in addition to fuel value.

facts.fact: Letters from home mattered because military mail was a morale channel.
facts.note: Home contact changes emotional state and persistence.
